title: End of Blackjack
description:
In End of Blackjack, you will play humanity's last hands of the classic game in atmospheric first-person. Forgotten rules and strategies are now experienced only through these machines, replayed by copper and silicon.

Classic Blackjack

Hit, stand, split, or vary your risk playing humanity’s last hands of classic blackjack.

AtmosphereHear the clacking of your key strokes and the clinking of cards as the nights pass around you. The contraption feels engineered to withstand the acrid environment you find yourself in.

Your PacePlay at your leisure, as this machine has no coin slots or expectations. Each hand dealt could be its last, but it is indifferent to its fate.
description_short: Find solace in humanity's last hands of Blackjack. Pierce the room with the clacking of keys as you sit, stand, split, or vary your risk.
